dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4164 : To make technical corrections to the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2026.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Wicker (for himself and Mr. Reed) introduced the following bill; which was read twice, considered, read the third time, and passed

form.official-title: To make technical corrections to the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2026.

section.header: Technical corrections to National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2026

subsection.text: Subsection (a)(1)(B) of section 806 of title 10, United States Code (article 6 of the Uniform Code of Military Justice), as added by section 561(a) of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2026 (Public Law 119–60), is amended to read as follows:

subparagraph.text: maintains a license status in good standing that provides eligibility to practice law;

subsection.header: Authorization for award of the distinguished-service cross to Isaac Ike Camacho for acts of valor in Vietnam
subsection.text: Section 592 of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2026 (Public Law 119–60) is amended by striking posthumous in the section heading.
